method_backbone:
Completed and validated all required outputs in `./outputs/`.

- Method: Spatial diagonal Gaussian (PaDiM-style Mahalanobis scoring)
- Backbone: ImageNet-pretrained Wide ResNet-50-2
- Scored: 83/83 test images
- Maps: 83 single-channel 256×256 PNGs
- Image score range: 1.7245–90.3534
